Web Development Workshop
Date: 5 August 2026
Time: 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM
Venue: Computer Lab - Block A
Instructor: Web Development Expert
Maximum Participants: 80
Registration Deadline: 2 August 2026
About the Workshop:

The Web Development Workshop provides hands-on training in HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript. Participants will learn how to design responsive websites, understand front-end development concepts, and build their own simple web pages during the session.
Workshop Rules:

• Bring your own laptop (if possible).
• Basic knowledge of computers is required.
• Follow lab rules and guidelines.
• Active participation is encouraged.
